name: Viridis Holdings Corp.
summary: Viridis Holdings Corp. does not have significant operations. Previously, it was engaged in the manufacture and distribution of wood pellets and shavings for residential and industrial customers. The company was formerly known as Viridis Energy Inc. and changed its name to Viridis Holdings Corp. in August 2018. Viridis Holdings Corp. was incorporated in 1998 and is based in Vancouver, Canada.
